headline: 2 Reasons to Watch CI and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Over the last six months, Cigna shares have sunk to $277.13, producing a disappointing 9.7% loss - worse than the S&P 500’s 2.1% drop. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: UnitedHealth (UNH) Soars 9.4%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock suggests that there could be more strength down the road.
